intro.title: Vision, Mission & Strategy
intro.description: BIET continues to evolve to meet the demands of a competitive world by focusing on innovation, quality education and continuous improvement.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To be a centre of excellence recognized nationally and internationally in engineering education and research based on innovation and invention.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: To provide quality engineering education and empower students with knowledge, leadership skills and ethical values for success.
